title: Winter Arrivals from Northwind Botanicals
preheaderText: Winter arrivals from Northwind Botanicals. Three new arrangements, direct from Pacific Northwest farms working through the storm season.
heroImageAlt: Late winter arrangements from Northwind Botanicals
heroParagraph: New winter arrivals from Northwind Botanicals: three arrangements from farms working through the wet season. Small batches. Direct shipping.
heroBgHeadline: Winter, if you look at it right
heroBgSubtext: Three arrangements from farms working through the wet season.
legalText: Northwind Botanicals, Inc. 1215 SE Ankeny Street, Portland, OR 97214. A fictitious brand used as sample content in an open-source HTML email compatibility framework. See github.com/dcondrey/html-email for details.
